initial.subject: Re: {job_title} opportunity at {company}
initial.body:
Hi {first_name},

I came across the {job_title} role at {company} and am very interested. As a {my_title} with experience in {my_skills}, I believe I'd be a strong fit.

Would love to connect and discuss further.

Best,
{my_name}

followup_1.subject: Re: {job_title} opportunity at {company} - Following up
followup_1.body:
Hi {first_name},

Just wanted to follow up on my earlier message about the {job_title} position. I'd love to discuss how my background in {my_skills} could contribute to {company}.

Best,
{my_name}

followup_2.subject: Re: {job_title} at {company}
followup_2.body:
Hi {first_name},

Last check-in on this — still very interested in the {job_title} role. Happy to share my resume or schedule a call at your convenience.

Best,
{my_name}
